title: Test Automation Specialist for DevOps Center of Excellence
company: If P&C Insurance AS Latvijas filiāle

summary.lv: If P&C Insurance meklē Test Automation speciālistu DevOps Center of Excellence komandai, kas attīstīs DevOps un DevEx vērsto inženierijas atbalsta funkciju, izstrādājot platformu, prakses un rīkus mērogojamai testēšanai.
summary.en: If P&C Insurance is hiring a Test Automation Specialist for the DevOps Center of Excellence to evolve a DevEx-driven engineering enablement function — building the platform, practices and tooling for scalable testing.
